title: Deploy and manage resources in Azure by using JSON ARM templates
summary: Learn how JSON ARM templates enable you to manage both basic and complex infrastructure deployments on Azure.

sections.title: Deploy and manage resources in Azure by using JSON ARM templates
sections.summary: Learn how JSON ARM templates enable you to manage both basic and complex infrastructure deployments on Azure.

lessons.title: Deploy Azure infrastructure by using JSON ARM templates
lessons.content_md:
Write JSON Azure Resource Manager templates by using Visual Studio Code to deploy your infrastructure to Azure consistently and reliably.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-azure-resource-manager-template-vs-code/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy Azure infrastructure by using JSON ARM templates

lessons.title: Validate Azure resources by using the ARM Template Test Toolkit
lessons.content_md:
Use the ARM Template Test Toolkit and apply it on your Azure Resource Manager templates to ensure the templates follow good practices before deployment.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/arm-template-test/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Validate Azure resources by using the ARM Template Test Toolkit

lessons.title: Extend Bicep and ARM templates using deployment scripts
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to add custom steps to your Azure Resource Manager templates (ARM templates) and Bicep files by using deployment scripts.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/extend-resource-manager-template-deployment-scripts/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Extend Bicep and ARM templates using deployment scripts

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Deploy and manage resources in Azure by using JSON ARM templates
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Deploy and manage resources in Azure by using JSON ARM templates**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
